display.purpose: Slide h1; the projected headline. Themeable via --h1-size/--h1-weight/--h1-tracking.

title.purpose: Slide h3; rendered in Ink Muted.

body.purpose: Slide paragraphs and lists on an 18px page base.

mono.purpose: Code inline and blocks; vendored highlight.js does the coloring.

shadows.name: stage-lift
shadows.purpose: Slides and presentation cards at rest; the screen lifted off the booth wall.

shadows.name: nav-float
shadows.purpose: The fixed slide-navigation pill; highest resting surface.

motion.name: ease-state
motion.purpose: Hover/focus state changes on buttons, cards, links.

motion.name: slide-transition
motion.purpose: Deckset fade and push keyframes between slides; disabled under prefers-reduced-motion.

motion.name: slide-entrance
motion.purpose: slideIn: fade + 20px rise when a slide becomes active.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Slide navigation control; pill-shaped Cue Blue fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: var(--color-accent, #3b82f6); color: var(--color-on-accent, #ffffff); border: none; border-radius: 1.5rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--color-accent-hover, #2563eb); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-accent, #3b82f6); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { background: #9ca3af; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Presentation Card
components.description: Homepage deck tile: 16:9 preview above title and metadata.
components.html:
Docker & Kubernetes 101

24 slides · Updated 2026-06-02
components.css: .ds-card { background: var(--color-canvas, #ffffff); border-radius: 0.5rem; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); transition: box-shadow 0.2s ease; max-width: 320px; } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 0 2px 4px -2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } .ds-card-preview { aspect-ratio: 16 / 9; background: var(--color-surface-1, #f8fafc); } .ds-card-body { padding: 1.5rem; } .ds-card-title { margin: 0 0 0.5rem 0; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--color-ink, #1f2937); } .ds-card-meta { margin: 0; font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--color-ink-subtle, #6b7280); }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Homepage deck filter with leading icon.
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { position: relative; display: inline-block; } .ds-input-icon { position: absolute; left: 0.75rem; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); color: var(--color-ink-subtle, #6b7280); pointer-events: none; } .ds-input-search { width: 16rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem 0.5rem 2.5rem; border: 1px solid var(--color-hairline, #e5e7eb); border-radius: 0.375rem; font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--color-ink, #1f2937); background: var(--color-canvas, #ffffff); } .ds-input-search:focus { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--color-accent, #3b82f6); border-color: transparent; }

components.name: Slide Navigation Pill
components.description: Fixed bottom-center floating control cluster on presentation pages.
components.css: .ds-nav-pill { display: inline-flex; gap: 0.5rem; align-items: center; background: var(--color-canvas, #ffffff); border-radius: 2rem; box-shadow: 0 10px 25px -5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); padding: 0.5rem; } .ds-nav-btn { background: var(--color-accent, #3b82f6); color: var(--color-on-accent, #ffffff); border: none; border-radius: 1.5rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s; } .ds-nav-btn:hover { background: var(--color-accent-hover, #2563eb); } .ds-nav-counter { padding: 0.5rem 1rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--color-ink, #374151); }

components.name: Slide Number Chip
components.description: Corner slide counter overlaid on the slide surface.
components.css: .ds-slide-number { display: inline-block; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7); color: #ffffff; padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 0.25rem; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; } .ds-slide-current { font-weight: 600; } .ds-slide-sep { margin: 0 0.25rem; opacity: 0.7; } .ds-slide-total { opacity: 0.8; }

narrative.overview: This site is the booth, and the decks are the show. Every visible surface belongs to one of two worlds: the stage (slides, rendered at a strict 16:9, lifted off the page on soft shadow) or the machinery (nav, cards, chrome), which stays engineered, quiet, and exact so the light falls on the work. The system serves a portfolio whose claim is "the archive itself is the evidence": chrome precision is itself part of the pitch. The whole visual layer runs through a token contract. Theme stylesheets define only :root custom properties (16 color roles, 3 font stacks, heading scale, radii); base CSS consumes var(--…) and nothing else. Sixteen themes (light, dark, minimal, plus 13 compiled from design-md/) swap through a single stylesheet link at runtime.
keyCharacteristics: Two-world discipline: luminous stage, quiet machinery
Strict 16:9 slide geometry at every viewport
One accent color, spent on interaction only
Theme-proof: every surface styleable through the token contract
Motion as stagecraft: slide transitions, not decoration

rules.name: The Token Contract Rule
rules.body: Base CSS never hardcodes a color. Every color is var(--color-…, fallback), so all 16 themes restyle the site without touching a selector. A hex value outside a theme file is a defect.

rules.name: The Cue Rule
rules.body: Cue Blue is reserved for things a visitor can do. Never use it as decoration, background wash, or emphasis on static text.

rules.name: The Fit Ceiling Rule
rules.body: [fit] headers may scale to 12rem inside a slide, because a slide is a stage. Chrome typography never exceeds Display scale.

rules.name: The Two Layers Rule
rules.body: Only the stage (slides, cards) and the nav pill cast shadows. Everything else is flat. A third shadow tier means something is on the wrong layer.

dos: Do route every color, font, and radius through the token contract (--color-…, --font-…, --radius-…); test changes in at least light, dark, and one compiled design-md theme.
Do keep slides at exact 16:9 at every breakpoint; content adapts inside the frame, never the frame.
Do keep body contrast at or above 4.5:1 in every theme (WCAG 2.1 AA), including text over background images via the readability overlay.
Do give every animation a prefers-reduced-motion: reduce fallback, as the slide transitions already do.
Do keep the site self-contained: vendored assets, system fonts, zero CDN calls at view time.
donts: Don't ship corporate slideware: no PowerPoint-export chrome, no SharePoint-era archive tables.
Don't drift into the generic SaaS landing (hero, three feature cards, testimonial strip) on the homepage; it is an archive shelf, not a pitch page.
Don't leave surfaces at bare-docs plainness: unstyled lists that undersell the work are the named failure mode.
Don't spend Cue Blue on decoration; it marks interaction only (The Cue Rule).
Don't add gradient chrome or badges; the existing enhanced-indicator gradient is legacy, not license.
Don't hardcode a hex outside a theme file, ever (The Token Contract Rule).
